signals.reasoning: Hold and manage the live TON short for now. This is a fresh re-entry already sitting at its current peak P&L, and the macro tape still leans risk-off, though the lack of a valid stop keeps conviction capped.
BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains the cleanest reduced-size short lean because price is still down while open interest is still slightly rising, which is consistent with fresh shorts pressing.
DASH is already in a hard liquidation-flush state and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
HEMI remains a modest reduced-size short lean because price is weak while funding is still positive, which leaves the long side somewhat crowded.
ETHFI is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
LIT has strong negative funding but is already down and showing fresh-shorts-pressing behavior, so I would rather wait than force a new trade.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
MERL is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh position.
